annotations
  • we convert composites to simple glyphs if any component is missing: https://github.com/googlefonts/fontc/issues/1858
  • (to add or change, manually edit annotations.json)

annotations
  • fontc fails on designspace with non-identical feature files across UFO sources: https://github.com/googlefonts/fontc/issues/1552

Default content
close [x]
